3312750.name: Fantasy Grounds - FG Haunted Ruins Map Pack
3312750.description:
FG Haunted Ruins Map Pack

The FG Haunted Ruins Map Pack features images and art produced by our in-house artist, Joshua Watmough. They have been organized and optimized for use with Fantasy Grounds Unity and the image tools. This art pack consists of images that can be used to create top-down environments of classic haunted abandoned buildings. You can build unique areas or add to existing maps. This pack includes the following items:
  • Brushes of hedges, walls, worn paths, and more
  • Fills of dead grass, rocky ground, dead leaves, and more
  • Decorations of dead trees and branches, dead leaves, broken furniture, and more
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joshua Watmough
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
